productName: A.C. Diamond Stix Joint - Gary Payton - 1g (H)
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Gary Payton and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of apricot, pepper, and lavender, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
